surface: Kyn.ist Agent Studio full Playwright product journey

checks.name: runtime exposes SQLite, browser-session BYOK, and official OpenAI SDK transport
onboarding explains a configurable operating system rather than a scripted click demo

detail.title:
Build agent workflows.
Operate their truth.

checks.name: desktop onboarding has no document overflow
fresh workspace seeds editable Actions, Agents, Prompts, Skills, and a nontrivial Flow
published Flow renders as a real editable graph with independent named ports
both side panels collapse into a genuinely full canvas
a seeded Action is selectable, editable, and append-versioned without mutation
Action authoring exposes more than success and failure as first-class outputs
Router Action publishes a typed four-port contract
Agent pins the exact Prompt and Skill versions and inherits only their explicit authority
AI configuration is visible as an Agent stack rather than hidden node state
New Flow starts from an actually empty graph
visual authoring publishes the graph, positions, mappings, and four outcomes
dialogs receive focus, trap keyboard traversal, close with Escape, and restore the opener
deterministic Flow executes without a key and exposes the selected named outcome with evidence
Flow editing appends a successor while prior Run graph pins remain unchanged
published Flows appear in the node library as immutable subflow capabilities
subflow execution retains linked parent/child truth and independent hash chains
signed webhook enters the same pinned Run seam and executes the reusable Flow
OpenAI key remains browser-session state and is never rendered back into the document
AI Flow invokes a pinned Agent stack, records model evidence, and pauses before effects

Run graph renders every pinned node and propagates node measurements, probed through the MiniMap because it alone re-derives from live measured dimensions while the canvas keeps drawing from static positions
human decision resumes the exact pinned graph into one attributable idempotent effect
SmartRead focus initializes a legal bounded range for the selected immutable version
SmartRead returns bounded source text with an immutable version, fingerprint, and exact line citation
the BoardRoom factory exposes every Prompt, Skill, Agent, Action, Flow, quorum, and downstream authority choice before publication

detail.manifest: Publication manifest ·  · 4 · Prompts ·  · 4 · Skills ·  · 4 · Agents ·  · 7 · Actions ·  · 1 · editable Flow ·  · Every artifact is immutable and remains editable through its normal registry.

checks.name: SmartRead transfers the cited envelope into the real BoardRoom Run contract without flattening provenance
three independent model Steps join through a code-owned barrier while the actual verdict distribution remains first-class evidence
the Runs console makes the fan-out, member verdicts, deterministic join, and surviving dissent visible without opening raw JSON
the human gate resumes the exact pinned BoardRoom into an explicit result without granting hidden write authority

dissent: Product challenges launch because the record provides constraints but no executable proposal, concrete user workflow, validation result, or end-to-end demonstration of user value. It also lacks proof of inspectability, a defined final Run and minted effect, and—in the underlying launch evidence—a documented dissent-solicitation record. Shipping would substitute stated intent for demonstrated utility.

Risk challenges launch because the source-to-Run trace, technical enforcement of authority boundaries, required human gate, and dissent record are not demonstrated. Merely stating that participants cannot approve or mint effects does not prove those controls are enforced.

Operations challenges launch because operational repeatability, bounded execution, observability, recovery, and human authorization remain unproven. No replayable Run, trace, monitoring thresholds, execution limits, rollback evidence, recovery owner, or persisted decision artifact is supplied. Consensus or quorum must not be treated as proof where visible dissent is required.

checks.name: a BoardRoom opens as the ordinary full graph, edits its fan-out composition, and publishes forward without rewriting prior Run truth
Run-derived learning enters append-only quarantine and remains absent from recall
only a qualified, fingerprint-acknowledged human promotion becomes recallable with full provenance
Capability Forge distils one completed model Step through a different logical Agent into an authority-free quarantine
the provenance gate replays source truth, citations, independence, fingerprints, and zero authority without another model call
human promotion publishes one immutable Skill v1 while every Agent and Flow remains pinned until a later successor
a cross-model sweep renders its proof of control before any measurement, and a sweep whose provider silently renamed a model is marked unusable rather than presentable
Run detail surfaces the derived dead end as canonical with its distinct-Run count and citing Run links
the next Run on the canonical path is refused before creation and the refusal cites the three prior Runs

a Flow matching a distilled principle publishes successfully and is advised rather than refused, and the workspace surface states the rule and derives its vocabulary ceiling from the shipped predicate table
maintenance cites owned evidence, appends bounded successors, preserves failure, and proves changed behavior
completion contracts are authorable: a successor pins the Judge and a new promise, evidence kind, and site

criteria.statement: The submitted record was written to the workspace evidence ledger.
The ledger write reported success rather than a mere attempt.
The deterministic readiness gate completed and recorded its routing decision.

checks.name: a seeded Flow declares what finishing means, and a Run whose input never reached the declared work is refused instead of reported finished
the Runs console renders the stop-seam refusal and names every declared promise that carried no accepted evidence

detail.text:
STOP SEAM · 3 DECLARED ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

Completion refused · 2 declared promises went unevidenced

Nothing crashed. The pinned Flow version declares what finishing means here, and record-in-ledger, ledger-write-succeeded carried no anchor this runtime would accept — so the work was stopped rather than called finished, and every Step, receipt and effect it did produce is still below, untouched. The Run records completion_unevidenced.

Refused
Model claim · non-authoritative
agtv_78c940414d1b27

The readiness gate was completed and recorded a false routing decision. No evidence shows any action at the declared publish-to-ledger site; instead, the record was routed to hold-for-revision and explicitly reported as published nowhere.

The model may explain and nominate anchors. Only deterministic resolution against runtime-minted records admits completion.
Unevidenced
The submitted record was written to the workspace evidence ledger.
record-in-ledger
ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE
Effect
DECLARED SITES
publish-to-ledger
ANCHORS THAT SURVIVED
0
ANCHORS DISCARDED
0
JUDGE REASONING · CLAIM ONLY

There is no effect evidence or other evidence at the declared site publish-to-ledger showing that the record was written. The supplied hold-for-revision evidence says it was published nowhere.

No anchor survived resolution, so this criterion carries nothing.

Unevidenced
The ledger write reported success rather than a mere attempt.
ledger-write-succeeded
ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE
Receipt
DECLARED SITES
publish-to-ledger
ANCHORS THAT SURVIVED
0
ANCHORS DISCARDED
0
JUDGE REASONING · CLAIM ONLY

There is no successful receipt from the declared site publish-to-ledger. The only publication-related receipt is from hold-for-revision and reports that the record was published nowhere.

No anchor survived resolution, so this criterion carries nothing.

Evidenced
The deterministic readiness gate completed and recorded its routing decision.
readiness-evaluated
ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE
Step
DECLARED SITES
readiness-gate
ANCHORS THAT SURVIVED
1
ANCHORS DISCARDED
0
JUDGE REASONING · CLAIM ONLY

The completed step at readiness-gate records actual readiness 0.31, matched false, and route_outcome false, demonstrating that the deterministic gate completed and recorded its routing decision.

SURVIVING ANCHORS · 1

checks.name: the identical pinned Flow version admits when the Run actually reached the declared work, so the refusal was about this Run's data and not the definition

every rendered button has an accessible name
visible text clears WCAG AA contrast across every workbench in both themes
reduced-motion preference collapses interaction transitions
390px reload preserves a legible pannable graph without page overflow
server sends restrictive security and no-store headers
browser makes no cross-origin runtime request
browser journey has no failed request
browser journey has no console or page error
